_meta.description: Centralized disclaimer logic for all domains

standard.text: This information is extracted from documents for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal advice. Consult a qualified attorney for legal guidance.

interpretation.text: Any interpretation provided is for informational purposes only. The original document language is legally binding.

liability.text: Review of liability clauses should be verified by legal counsel before any decisions are made.

standard.text: This information is extracted from medical documents and is not medical advice. Consult a healthcare professional for medical guidance.

clinical.text: Clinical information should not be used for diagnosis or treatment decisions without professional medical consultation.

emergency.text: If this is a medical emergency, contact emergency services immediately.

medication.text: Medication information should be verified with a pharmacist or prescribing physician.

standard.text: This information is extracted from financial documents and does not constitute financial advice. Consult a qualified financial advisor.

investment.text: Past performance does not guarantee future results. Investment decisions should be made with professional guidance.

accuracy.text: Financial figures should be verified against audited source documents.

standard.text: Technical information should be verified against official specifications by qualified personnel.

safety.text: Safety-critical specifications must be verified by authorized engineers before use.

compliance.text: Compliance with industry standards must be confirmed through proper certification processes.

calculation.text: Verify formula results in your spreadsheet application.

accuracy.text: Extracted values should be verified against the source document.

interpretation.text: This analysis represents one interpretation. Alternative interpretations may exist.

changes.text: Review all suggested changes carefully before applying.

deduplication.description: If domain and intent disclaimers overlap, show domain version
